stealth_objectives.instruction: STEALTH OBJECTIVE: Locate and Retrieve. An item must be located using 'Finding the Target' rules. Once located, it must be picked up and exfiltrated off any table edge.
STEALTH OBJECTIVE: Deliver Item. An item must be delivered to the objective (table center). Select which crew member carries it. Once delivered, crew can exfiltrate.
STEALTH OBJECTIVE: Locate and Contact. An individual must be located using 'Finding the Target' rules. Once located, move within 3" and Line of Sight, then exfiltrate.

STEALTH OBJECTIVE: Rescue Individual. Individual placed at table center. Reach within 3" and LoS — they join your crew for the mission. Exfiltrate them. If individual wanders off table edge, they count as Rescued.
STEALTH OBJECTIVE: Transmit Message. Individual placed at table center. Reach within 3" and LoS to deliver message and get reply, then exfiltrate. If individual wanders off table, mission FAILS.
STEALTH OBJECTIVE: Retrieve Package. Item placed at table center. Pick it up and exfiltrate off any table edge.

individual_rules:
INDIVIDUAL BEHAVIOR:
- Moves base Speed (4") in random direction at end of each Enemy Phase.
- Enemy ignores Individuals (strict orders / stealth equipment / psionic shielding).
- Third-party creatures (vent crawlers) WILL attack Individuals.
- Halt at dangerous terrain features or environmental hazards.
- Not armed. You can give them a weapon, but once armed, enemy treats them as normal target.
- If caught by Area weapon and surviving, they Dash to nearest terrain and hide for rest of game.
- RESCUE: If individual wanders off table edge, counts as Rescued.
- OTHER MISSIONS: If individual wanders off table, mission FAILS.
finding_target_rules:
FINDING THE TARGET:
1. Mark terrain features within 6" of table center as candidates (min 3; add markers if needed).
2. When crew moves within 6" and LoS of a candidate: roll 1D6+Savvy.
   - 6+: Target found. Place within/on feature at most distant point from discovering figure.
   - 5 or less: Feature does not contain target.
3. Last remaining candidate automatically contains the target.
item_rules:
ITEM RULES:
- Carrying does not hinder movement or fighting.
- Hand off during movement as free action by moving within 1" of recipient.
- Can only be handed off once per battle round (no 'fire brigade' chains).
- If carrier becomes casualty, item drops at their location. Pick up by moving into contact.
- Enemies ignore items on ground. Unaffected by Area weapons.
- Item dropped in dangerous/hazardous terrain (acid pool etc.) is DESTROYED.
deployment_rules:
STEALTH DEPLOYMENT:
- ENEMIES: Deploy evenly throughout table. For every 4 enemies, 1 on raised terrain (rooftop, walkway, tower).
- CREW: Arrive from single randomly selected table edge in first battle round. All arrive from same edge but pick individual arrival points as you move on.
- ENEMY COUNT: Campaign crew size + 1 (normally 7). Includes 1 Specialist + 1 Lieutenant. Rest are basic troops.
- Roving Threats treated as Hired Muscle. Reroll Rampage AI enemies.
stealth_round_rules:
STEALTH ROUND (before alarm):
- Initiative dice rolled and assigned as normal.
- Movement rates (Dashing unavailable):
  Quick Actions Phase: Base move + 1"
  Slow Actions Phase: Base move - 1"

ENEMY BEHAVIOR during stealth:
1. Randomly select 1 enemy: remains in place, scans 360°, then faces random direction.
2. All other enemies: move base-1" in random direction, face movement direction.
   (They do NOT pan viewpoint when turning — only look in movement direction.)
3. Enemy that would move into wall/terrain/table edge: remains in place, scans 360°, faces directly away from obstacle.

FIELD OF VISION:
- Scanning enemy: 360° vision.
- Moving enemies: 90° in facing direction.
- While turning to move, enemies have NO active field of vision.
detection_rules:
DETECTION:
Crew risks detection when:
- Any part of crew move is within LoS and Field of Vision of enemy.
- Crew is within LoS and FoV at end of enemy move.
- Crew is within LoS when enemy scans (scanning = every direction).

SPOTTING ROLL: 2D6 for the enemy.
- Subtract 1 if enemy is scanning.
- Reduce by 2 if crew partially obscured by terrain (within or in contact).
- Reduce by 1 for each intervening terrain feature.
- The modified roll = spotting value for this round.

For each crew at risk, measure distance (round fractions DOWN to whole inch):
- Spotting value EXCEEDS distance → SPOTTED. Alarm raised immediately.
- Spotting value EQUALS distance (none spotted) → SUSPICIOUS. Enemy moves 1" toward crew, faces them, rolls again (not scanning). Can repeat multiple times.
- Spotting value BELOW distance → Not spotted.

stealth_tools.name: Stay Down
stealth_tools.instruction: STAY DOWN: Character remains stationary. Until next activation, all spotting rolls reduced by character's Savvy bonus (must be at least partially obscured by terrain).

stealth_tools.name: Distraction
stealth_tools.instruction: DISTRACTION: Select enemy within 6". Roll 1D6+Savvy. On 6+: enemy turns chosen direction immediately; next activation remains in place looking that way (no other actions). Natural 1: enemy turns to face you and makes spotting roll.

stealth_tools.name: Lure
stealth_tools.instruction: LURE: Every enemy within 8" immediately moves 1D6" toward crew member's location, then makes a spotting check. Each enemy moves individually; single spotting roll applies to all.

stealth_attack_rules:
ATTACKING IN STEALTH:
- Crew attacking from OUTSIDE enemy FoV gets +2 to shooting or Brawling roll.
- Alarm is set off if:
  - A weapon other than handgun or needle rifle is fired.
  - Target of shot or Brawl is NOT knocked out.
  - A ripper sword is used in Brawling combat.
alarm_rules:
ALARM!
- Current Stealth round ends immediately. Begin new normal battle round.
- If alarm raised mid-round, end Stealth round without completing remaining actions.
- Randomly select table edge for enemy reinforcements.

REINFORCEMENTS:
- Beginning of each battle round: roll 2D6.
- Each die showing 6 → 1 basic enemy arrives at center of enemy edge.
- Arriving enemies placed immediately but cannot act in arrival round.
psionic_rules:
PSIONICS IN STEALTH:
- Grab, Shock, Psionic Scare targeting enemy: sets off alarm UNLESS target removed from play.
- Predict: Roll twice for enemy spotting roll.
- Shroud: Counts as terrain feature (-2 to spotting), but does NOT block LoS.
exfiltration_rules:
EXFILTRATION:
- Once objective achieved, crew must leave battlefield via any table edge.
- When rolling initiative each turn, you may select a single crew member assigned a 6 and remove them from play — they have exfiltrated successfully.
- This can be used BEFORE objective is completed.
- Exfiltrated crew cannot return to the battlefield.

rival.instruction: RIVAL MISSION: Always a Conventional battle.

invasion.instruction: INVASION BATTLE: Always a Conventional battle.

opportunity.instruction: OPPORTUNITY MISSION: Roll D6. 1-4 Conventional, 5 Stealth, 6 Street Fight.

patron.instruction: PATRON MISSION: Roll D6. 1-2 Conventional, 3-4 Stealth, 5-6 Street Fight.

faction.instruction: FACTION MISSION: Roll D6. 1 Conventional (as Patron), 2-4 Stealth, 5-6 Street Fight.

quest.instruction: QUEST MISSION: Roll D6. 1-3 Conventional, 4 Stealth, 5 Street Fight, 6 Salvage (or Stealth if no Freelancer's Handbook).
